project.name: Future Code Delta
project.summary: A browser-facing edition of the batcode-playground repository, designed to present the project professionally on current IONOS webspace while preserving the full backend build in source control.

pages.name: Ops Center
pages.summary: Primary operations center with code execution, multi-mode editors, project downloads, and agent controls.

pages.name: Cyber Intel
pages.summary: Cyber security interface that surfaces CVE lookups, encryption tools, resource checks, and headers analysis.

pages.name: AI Recon
pages.summary: AI workspace for prompt execution, model selection, and multi-provider response orchestration.

pages.name: Tactical Map
pages.summary: Map-oriented interface for spatial viewing, overlays, and field-style navigation in the browser.

pages.name: Scripture Desk
pages.summary: Scripture lookup and study surface with backend-powered verse retrieval and query handling.

pages.name: Drone Watch
pages.summary: Large-format drone and surveillance interface with browser-rendered visuals and monitoring panels.

pages.name: Radio Monitor
pages.summary: Audio-focused station and recording interface for radio-style playback and browser listening flows.

pages.name: Truth Console
pages.summary: Narrative control surface that mixes browser presentation with API-powered scripture retrieval.

routes.summary: Serve the primary operations center.
Expose a simple health check for monitoring and deployment validation.
Execute Python, Java, HTML, CSS, or composite web snippets.
Accept build instructions and generate or execute project output through the local agent.
List generated projects created by the local agent workflow.
Delete one or more generated project directories.
Download a generated project as a zip archive.
Bundle multiple generated projects into one zip download.
Serve the cyber operations interface.
Fetch recent CVE information.
Search CVE data by keyword.
Serve the AI interface.
Process AI requests through configured providers.
Return the AI model inventory for the UI.
Create a share token for a saved snippet or workspace state.
Return share data by identifier.
Render a shared workspace back through the main interface.
Encrypt text via the cyber tools surface.
Inspect security headers for a provided URL.
Return curated cyber resources to the UI.
Serve the tactical map page.
Serve the scripture page.
Retrieve scripture content for the bible and truth pages.
Serve the drone operations page.
Serve the radio monitor page.
Serve the truth console page.

files.summary: Flask entrypoint with the page routes, API endpoints, and share surface.
Python dependency list for Flask, requests, pytest, and related tooling.
Container definition for running the full app with Gunicorn and a headless JDK.
Top-level project overview, quick start steps, and product framing.
IONOS-specific deployment notes covering the whole project folder.
Agent package marker for the internal project generator.
Rule-based generation logic for agent-created project scaffolds.
Execution helper with safety limits for generated code.
LLM integration bridge for expanding build instructions.
Simple Java example used by the playground surface.
Primary stylesheet for the original bat-themed Flask UI.
Main operations center template with editor panes, output, and agent controls.
AI interface template for prompts, models, and result flows.
Scripture interface template with search, bookmarks, and reading tools.
Cyber page template for CVEs, encryption, and security inspection.
Drone operations template with browser-rendered control surfaces.
Tactical map template for spatial interface views.
Radio interface template for playback, recordings, and stations.
Truth console template with scripture-powered presentation flows.
Targeted tests for the local agent behavior.
Health route validation for the Flask application.

currentProducts.name: IONOS Web Hosting Plus
currentProducts.role: Current shared webspace that can publish the webspace-site edition without buying additional hosting.

currentProducts.name: IONOS Deploy Now Starter
currentProducts.role: GitHub-connected deployment product that is not suited to the full Flask runtime, but remains useful for static workflows.

currentProducts.name: futurecodedelta.org
currentProducts.role: Primary domain, currently unused and ready to connect to webspace or an external target.

freePath: Upload the contents of webspace-site/ to your IONOS webspace through FTP or the hosting file tools.
Use the Domains and SSL panel to connect futurecodedelta.org to the webspace directory where these files live.
Activate SSL for futurecodedelta.org once the folder is connected.
Use this site as the professional browser-facing presentation of the build folder on your current IONOS products.
upgradePath: Move the full Flask project to a Python-capable server or container host when you want the live backend online.
Deploy the existing Dockerfile-based app or run the Flask service behind Gunicorn on that host.
Point futurecodedelta.org to the server with DNS or the domain connection tools in IONOS.
Restore live code execution, agent workflows, downloads, and all backend APIs under the public domain.
notes: The current repository exposes 26 Flask routes and several POST APIs, which is larger than a simple shared-hosting static upload.
This webspace edition is intentionally static and professional: it shows the build, the modules, and the system surface in the browser.
The full local runtime remains preserved in source control and can be moved later without changing the public-facing brand.
